segments.text: Blessed are all who fear the Lord, who walk in obedience to him.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: You will eat the fruit of your labor; blessings and prosperity will be yours.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Your wife will be like a fruitful vine within your house; your children will be like olive shoots around your table.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Yes, this will be the blessing for the man who fears the Lord.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: May the Lord bless you from Zion; may you see the prosperity of Jerusalem all the days of your life.
segments.speaker: Psalmist

segments.text: May you live to see your children's children— peace be on Israel.
segments.speaker: Psalmist
